qual:
(vulnerability_id IN ( SELECT v.id
   FROM vulnerabilities v
  WHERE (v.tenant_id IN ( SELECT p.tenant_id
           FROM profiles p
          WHERE (p.user_id = ( SELECT ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) AS uid))))))
